questions.scenario: You just started a fight. Your first GCD should be Spinning Edge.
questions.question: What is the basic Ninja combo sequence?
questions.explanation: The basic combo is Spinning Edge → Gust Slash → finisher (Aeolian Edge or Armor Crush). Always complete full combos for maximum potency.

questions.scenario: You need to use Aeolian Edge. Where should you stand?
questions.question: What's the correct position for Aeolian Edge?
questions.explanation: Aeolian Edge requires rear positional for bonus damage. Armor Crush requires flank. Missing positionals loses significant potency.

questions.scenario: You have 0 Kazematoi stacks and need burst damage soon.
questions.question: How do you build Kazematoi stacks?
questions.explanation: Armor Crush (flank positional finisher) grants Kazematoi stacks. Aeolian Edge consumes them for enhanced damage.

questions.scenario: You're at flank and need to use Aeolian Edge.
questions.question: What happens if you use Aeolian Edge from flank instead of rear?
questions.explanation: Missing positionals loses the bonus potency. The attack still works, but you deal less damage.

questions.scenario: You used Spinning Edge, then got distracted. 15 seconds passed.
questions.question: What happens to your combo?
questions.explanation: Combos time out after ~15 seconds of not continuing. You'll need to restart from Spinning Edge.

questions.scenario: You want to use Raiton for single-target damage.
questions.question: What mudra sequence creates Raiton?
questions.explanation: Raiton is created by Ten → Chi or Chi → Ten. It's your bread-and-butter damage Ninjutsu.

questions.scenario: You need Suiton to enable Kunai's Bane.
questions.question: What mudra sequence creates Suiton?
questions.explanation: Suiton requires three mudras: Ten → Chi → Jin. It grants a buff that enables Kunai's Bane.

questions.scenario: You just pressed a GCD. Mudras are ready.
questions.question: When should you input mudras?
questions.explanation: Mudras are oGCDs - weave them during the GCD window. The resulting Ninjutsu is a GCD itself.

questions.scenario: You input the wrong mudra sequence.
questions.question: What happens when you mess up mudras?
questions.explanation: Invalid mudra sequences create Rabbit Medium (a bunny) - no damage, just embarrassment. Try again next time!

questions.scenario: At lower levels, Huton grants a speed buff.
questions.question: What mudra sequence creates Huton?
questions.explanation: Huton is Jin → Chi → Ten. At higher levels this buff is passive, but understanding mudras helps overall mastery.

questions.scenario: Your Ninki gauge is at 90. Bhavacakra costs 50.
questions.question: What should you do?
questions.explanation: At 90 Ninki, you're close to capping. Use Bhavacakra to avoid overcapping and wasting gauge generation.

questions.scenario: Single target fight. You have 50 Ninki.
questions.question: Which Ninki spender should you use?
questions.explanation: Bhavacakra is the single-target spender. Hellfrog Medium is for AoE (3+ targets).

questions.scenario: Kunai's Bane is coming up in 10 seconds. You have 40 Ninki.
questions.question: What's the optimal approach?
questions.explanation: Pool Ninki before burst windows. Spending Bhavacakra during Kunai's Bane buff deals more damage.

questions.scenario: You used Mug/Dokumori on the boss.
questions.question: How much Ninki does Mug/Dokumori generate?
questions.explanation: Mug/Dokumori generates 40 Ninki in addition to dealing damage. It's a significant gauge boost for your burst.

questions.scenario: You have 100 Ninki during Kunai's Bane window.
questions.question: How many Bhavacakras can you use?
questions.explanation: At 100 Ninki, you can use 2 Bhavacakras (50 each). Weave them between GCDs during the buff window.

questions.scenario: You want to use Kunai's Bane but don't have Suiton buff.
questions.question: Can you use Kunai's Bane without Suiton?
questions.explanation: Kunai's Bane requires the Suiton buff to be active. Always set up Suiton before your burst window.

questions.scenario: You successfully applied Kunai's Bane to the boss.
questions.question: What does Kunai's Bane do?
questions.explanation: Kunai's Bane applies a +10% damage taken debuff to the target. All your attacks deal more damage during this window.

questions.scenario: Mug/Dokumori is off cooldown. Kunai's Bane window is starting.
questions.question: When should you use Mug/Dokumori?
questions.explanation: Use Mug/Dokumori just before Kunai's Bane to maximize damage and generate Ninki for your burst window.

questions.scenario: Kunai's Bane has a 60 second cooldown.
questions.question: How does this align with party buffs?
questions.explanation: 60s cooldown means Kunai's Bane aligns with standard raid buff windows (60s/120s). Coordinate with your party.

questions.scenario: You used Suiton but the boss became untargetable before Kunai's Bane.
questions.question: What happens to your Suiton buff?
questions.explanation: Suiton buff has a duration. If you can't use Kunai's Bane in time, the buff expires and you'll need to reapply.

questions.scenario: Kassatsu is ready. You're about to use Ninjutsu.
questions.question: What Ninjutsu should you use after Kassatsu?
questions.explanation: Kassatsu enables Hyosho Ranryu, an ice Ninjutsu with massive potency. This is your highest damage Ninjutsu.

questions.scenario: You activated Ten Chi Jin. Boss starts an AoE.
questions.question: What happens if you move during TCJ?
questions.explanation: Ten Chi Jin cancels if you move or take damage. Position safely before activating it.

questions.scenario: You're using TCJ for 2-minute burst. What's the standard sequence?
questions.question: What Ninjutsu sequence during TCJ?
questions.explanation: Standard TCJ sequence is Fuma Shuriken → Raiton → Suiton. Suiton last sets up Kunai's Bane.

questions.scenario: Kassatsu and Kunai's Bane are both ready.
questions.question: How should you time Kassatsu?
questions.explanation: Use Kassatsu during Kunai's Bane so Hyosho Ranryu benefits from the +10% damage debuff.

questions.scenario: TCJ has a 120 second cooldown.
questions.question: How does TCJ align with raid buffs?
questions.explanation: TCJ's 120s cooldown aligns with 2-minute raid buff windows. Save it for coordinated party burst.

questions.scenario: You used Raiton. Raiju Ready buff appeared.
questions.question: What's the difference between Forked and Fleeting Raiju?
options: Forked is gap closer, Fleeting is stationary
questions.explanation: Forked Raiju closes distance to target. Fleeting Raiju is used from current position. Choose based on whether you need to move.

questions.scenario: You have Raiju Ready. Boss is far away.
questions.question: Which Raiju should you use?
questions.explanation: Use Forked Raiju to close the gap to the boss while dealing damage. It's a gap closer with damage.

questions.scenario: Bunshin is ready. Burst window is starting.
questions.question: When should you use Bunshin?
questions.explanation: Use Bunshin before burst so your shadow clone attacks during buffed abilities, maximizing damage.

questions.scenario: You used Bunshin. A new ability appeared.
questions.question: What is Phantom Kamaitachi?
questions.explanation: Phantom Kamaitachi is a GCD proc granted by Bunshin. It's AoE damage - use it before it expires.

questions.scenario: You just used Kunai's Bane. A new ability appeared.
questions.question: What is Tenri Jindo?
questions.explanation: Tenri Jindo is a powerful follow-up that appears after Kunai's Bane (Lv.100). Use it immediately for big damage.

questions.scenario: Burst window is coming. You have 0 Kazematoi stacks.
questions.question: What should you do before burst?
questions.explanation: Build Kazematoi stacks with Armor Crush before burst, then spend enhanced Aeolian Edges during the buff window.

questions.scenario: Boss is against the wall. You can't reach rear for Aeolian Edge.
questions.question: What should you use?
questions.explanation: True North removes positional requirements for 10s. Use it when you physically can't reach the correct position.

questions.scenario: You have Suiton buff but don't need Kunai's Bane (it's on cooldown).
questions.question: What can you do with the Suiton buff?
questions.explanation: Meisui converts Suiton buff into 50 Ninki. Use it when Kunai's Bane isn't available to avoid wasting the buff.

questions.scenario: 3 enemies are grouped together.
questions.question: What's the Ninja AoE combo?
questions.explanation: At 3+ targets, use Death Blossom → Hakke Mujinsatsu for higher total damage than single-target combos.

questions.scenario: 3 enemies will stand still for 20 seconds.
questions.question: Which AoE Ninjutsu is best?
questions.explanation: Doton creates a ground DoT. If enemies will stand in it for the full duration, it deals more total damage than Katon.
